top_signals.title: Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund reappointed
top_signals.summary: Nigel Topping, Tania Songini and Marianne Økland have been reappointed as Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund (NWF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Veja os Três Assuntos Que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
top_signals.summary:
O repórter Daniel Carvalho conta quais foram os assuntos de destaque na semana no Brasil. Com produção de Beatriz Reis e Patrícia Xavier, edição de Bárbara Nascimento.

Original filename: video 29 maio.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gap shares tumble 13% as retailer cuts sales guidance after disappointing Old Navy performance
top_signals.summary: Gap issued mixed results as sales at its largest brand, Old Navy, fell short of estimates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
